creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks, imported.  Changes: 

=== 
diff -ru linuxdoc-sgml/Makefile linuxdoc-sgml.new/Makefile 
--- linuxdoc-sgml/Makefile	Mon Apr  7 22:26:46 1997 
+++ linuxdoc-sgml.new/Makefile	Wed Jun  4 01:34:19 1997 
@@ -10,15 +10,13 @@ 
PKGNAME=	kr-linuxdoc-sgml-1.6bh2 
CATEGORIES=	korean 
MASTER_SITES=	ftp://jazz.snu.ac.kr/pub/unix/util/tools/ 
-EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.gz 

MAINTAINER=	junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr 

+RUN_DEPENDS=	perl5.004:${PORTSDIR}/lang/perl5 
+ 
MAN1=		sgml2html.1 sgml2latex.1 sgml2rtf.1 sgmls.1  
sgml2info.1 sgml2lyx.1   sgml2txt.1 sgmlsasp.1 
- 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	perl5.003:${PORTSDIR}/lang/perl5 
- 
NO_BUILD=	yes 

do-install: 
=== 

I also sorted the PLIST.
